blob_devnet_updates.highlight: blob-devnet-0: Partial cells spec finalized; Prysm bugs blocking progress
Testnet rollout planned once clients optimistic; limited validator subset first

bal_devnet_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-2: ~100% participation achieved; Erigon fixed proposal issues today
bal-devnet-3: EVM fuzzing breaks clients quickly; hash mismatches across implementations
bal-devnet-3 blockers: CREATE/CALL operations cause BAL hash divergence in Nimbus/Reth

epbs_status.highlight: epbs-devnet-0: Prysm/Lighthouse/Lodestar working; Teku cannot sync or propose
Exits not functional yet; deposits working correctly
Alpha3 released; epbs-devnet-1 will likely use PTC lookahead version (Alpha4)

eip_status_process.highlight: SFI process discussion: Should EIPs move to SFI after successful devnet?
Decision deferred to ACD; SFI only for stable EIPs without interaction risks

action_items.action: Draft PR to update EIP-7723 SFI criteria: stable devnet + minimal interactions

decisions.decision: SFI decisions remain with ACD, not ACDT
bal-devnet-3 EIPs eligible for SFI one week after stability demonstrated
Incomplete EIPs (e.g., 7637 gas repricing) excluded from SFI until finalized
